# Visual Baselines CI Port Implementation Plan (mezo-uz4g)

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Make the S8 Playwright visual-baseline harness (14 screens × 2 themes) a CI gate: hermetic fonts (self-hosted, no Google-Fonts CDN flake), a pinned timezone, linux goldens generated by a dispatchable workflow, and a `test-visual` job in `ci.yml`.

**Architecture:** Two PRs to break the bootstrap circle (a workflow_dispatch workflow must exist on the default branch before `gh workflow run` can target a feature ref). **PR-A** (tiny, merges first): `.github/workflows/update-visual-baselines.yml` — a dispatchable ubuntu job that regenerates ALL linux goldens on a given ref and pushes them back as a commit. **PR-B** (this branch): vendor Bricolage Grotesque + Plus Jakarta Sans woff2 (latin + latin-ext — Hungarian diacritics) with `@font-face`, drop the Google-Fonts `<link>`s (the JetBrains Mono family in the link is dead weight — `--ff-mono` renders system mono by design), pin `timezoneId` in the Playwright config, add the `test-visual` job to `ci.yml`; then dispatch PR-A's workflow against this branch so the linux goldens land, CI goes green, merge.

**Tech Stack:** GitHub Actions (ubuntu-latest, pnpm 9, node 20 — mirror the existing `test-frontend` job), `@playwright/test` ^1.60 (Chromium), woff2 assets under `frontend/public/fonts/`. Branch `feat/visual-baselines-ci`. bd **mezo-uz4g**.

## Global Constraints

- Worktree `/Users/daniel.kuhne/MrKuhne/mezo/.worktrees/frontend-design-rethink`, branch `feat/visual-baselines-ci` (PR-A gets its own throwaway branch). Verify branch before commits; NEVER touch the main checkout; NEVER `git stash`; NEVER run `bd`.
- Commits: hooks disabled, explicit paths, `git show --stat HEAD` check, strip stray issues.jsonl.
- Gate after code tasks: `cd frontend && pnpm build && pnpm test && VITE_USE_MOCK=true pnpm test` + `pnpm test:visual` (darwin, local).
- Font vendoring must be **byte-faithful**: fetch the exact woff2 files Google serves for the current css2 URL (modern-Chrome UA → woff2 + unicode-range subsets); keep `font-display: swap`; latin + latin-ext subsets for BOTH families; weights per the current link (Bricolage variable opsz,wght 12..96/400..800; Jakarta 400–800). If local rendering shifts the darwin goldens, re-baseline + disclose (expected: minimal/none — same binaries).
- The `test-visual` CI job must cache the Playwright browser (`~/.cache/ms-playwright`) keyed on the Playwright version, and run `pnpm exec playwright install chromium --with-deps` on cache miss.
- Linux goldens are COMMITTED (suffix `-linux.png` per Playwright convention); the update workflow pushes with the default `GITHUB_TOKEN` (`permissions: contents: write`) and a `chore(visual): regenerate linux baselines [skip ci]`-style message WITHOUT `[skip ci]` on PR branches (CI must re-run to validate) — use plain `chore(visual): regenerate linux baselines`.
- Docs: `docs/infrastructure/local-dev-testing.md` + `docs/features/_platform-design-system.md` §8 harness section updated (CI gate now real; local darwin + CI linux golden pairs; how to re-baseline each). Lint PASS at close.

---

### Task 1 (PR-A): the update-visual-baselines workflow

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/update-visual-baselines.yml`

```yaml
name: update-visual-baselines
on:
  workflow_dispatch: {}   # run against any ref via gh workflow run -r <branch>
permissions:
  contents: write
jobs:
  regenerate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults: { run: { working-directory: frontend } }
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with: { ref: "${{ github.ref_name }}" }
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with: { version: 9 }
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20, cache: pnpm, cache-dependency-path: frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml }
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pw-cache
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
          key: pw-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
      - run: pnpm exec playwright install chromium --with-deps
      - run: pnpm test:visual:update
      - name: Commit regenerated linux goldens
        working-directory: .
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add frontend/tests/visual/*-snapshots/*-linux.png
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "no golden changes" && exit 0
          git commit -m "chore(visual): regenerate linux baselines (mezo-uz4g)"
          git push
```

**Steps:** create on a throwaway branch `feat/visual-baseline-workflow` cut from origin/main → PR → CI green (workflow file only; no jobs run) → controller merges (detached-worktree recipe) so the workflow exists on the default branch. (No frontend gate needed — zero app code.)

### Task 2 (PR-B): font vendoring + hermetic config

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/public/fonts/*.woff2` (Bricolage Grotesque variable latin+latin-ext; Plus Jakarta Sans latin+latin-ext, weights 400–800 — fetch exactly what the current css2 URL serves to a modern-Chrome UA) + `frontend/src/styles/fonts.css` (the `@font-face` blocks copied from the css2 response, `src: url('/fonts/<file>.woff2')`, `font-display: swap`, unicode-range preserved)
- Modify: `frontend/src/index.css` (import fonts.css FIRST), `frontend/index.html` (drop the two preconnects + the css2 `<link>`; the JetBrains Mono family disappears with it — deliberate, `--ff-mono` = system-mono debug token)
- Modify: `frontend/tests/visual/playwright.config.ts` — `use: { …, timezoneId: 'Europe/Budapest' }` (hermetic frozen-clock daypart)
- Verify PWA: the vite-pwa precache picks up `public/fonts` automatically (glob) — check the generated `dist/sw.js` precache manifest mentions the woff2 files; report.

**Steps:** vendor → wire → full gate → `pnpm test:visual` (if darwin goldens shift: re-baseline via `pnpm test:visual:update` + green ×2 + disclose which screens) → commit `feat(fe): self-host Bricolage+Jakarta fonts, hermetic visual config (mezo-uz4g)`.

### Task 3 (PR-B): the ci.yml test-visual job + docs

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — new `test-visual` job (ubuntu-latest, frontend workdir, pnpm 9/node 20 mirroring `test-frontend`, Playwright browser cache + install, `pnpm test:visual`, on failure upload `frontend/tests/visual/test-results/` as an artifact `visual-diffs`)
- Modify: `docs/infrastructure/local-dev-testing.md` (visual gate section: local darwin vs CI linux goldens, the update workflow, how to re-baseline) + `docs/features/_platform-design-system.md` §8 (CI gate now real; drop the "local-only" caveat)

**Steps:** job + docs → lint PASS → commit `ci: visual-baseline gate — test-visual job + linux golden workflow docs (mezo-uz4g)`. NOTE: CI on this PR will show `test-visual` RED at this point (no linux goldens yet) — expected; Task 4 fixes it.

### Task 4 (PR-B, controller): bootstrap linux goldens + land

**Steps (controller, not a subagent):** push PR-B → `gh workflow run update-visual-baselines.yml -r feat/visual-baselines-ci` → wait; the bot commit adds 28 `-linux.png` → pull it locally → re-run local gate sanity (darwin goldens unaffected) → CI re-runs on the bot push → all 5 jobs green (incl. test-visual) → detached-worktree merge → close mezo-uz4g.

---

## Execution order & review protocol
T1 (PR-A, merges immediately) → T2 → T3 (implementer+reviewer gates as usual) → T4 (controller). Ledger section `# Visual-baselines-CI SDD progress` in `.superpowers/sdd/progress.md`. Final review: T2+T3 are small; a single combined reviewer pass per task suffices (no separate whole-branch fable pass — the slice is ~3 commits of infra; the CI run itself is the integration test).

**Present to human at close:** (1) fonts now self-hosted (offline PWA benefit; Google Fonts CDN dependency gone); (2) the JetBrains Mono webfont request disappears (was dead weight); (3) CI gains a 5th job (`test-visual`); (4) re-baseline flows: local `pnpm test:visual:update` (darwin) / `gh workflow run update-visual-baselines.yml -r <branch>` (linux).
